chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI S.M.A. NO. 47/2019 Date Order with signature of Judge BEFORE: Mr. Justice Arshad Hussain Khan. Aamir Mumtaz Khan........................... Petitioner Mumtaz Ahmed Khan........................... Deceased FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE 09.04.2019. Syed Tariq Arif Ali Shah advocate for petitioner ---------------------------------- ARSHAD HUSSAIN KHAN, J.- The petitioner through the instant SMA seeks grant of letters of administration in respect of immoveable property left by deceased Aamir Mumtaz Khan s/o Mumtaz Ahmed Khan who died on 31.05.2015 at Karachi. The deceased died intestate and at the time of his death left behind the following legal heirs:- 1. Mst. Talat M. Zafar Daughter 2. Sohail Mumtaz Khan Son 3. Mst. Riffat Mumtaz Daughter 4. Asif Mumtaz Khan Son 5. Aamir Mumtaz Khan Son Legal heir No.5 is the petitioner and son of the deceased. All the legal heirs have filed their respective affidavits of no objection in favour of petitioner. Legal heirs No.4 has executed Power of Attorneys in favour of the petitioner. 3. The affidavits of two independent witnesses namely, Muhammad Youns s/o Muhammad Yousuf and Muhammad Rafiq s/o Muhammad Yaseen are also available on record, which support the contention of the petitioner. 4. The legal heirs No.1 to 3 and 5 and independent witness are present in Court, have admitted and acknowledged the contents of their respective affidavits of no objection in favour of the petitioner. 5. The deceased at the time of his death left behind the immoveable properties which are mentioned in the Schedule of Properties (Annexure “F” at 23 of this petition).

The legal heirs No.1 to 3 and 5 and independent witness are present in Court, have admitted and acknowledged the contents of their respective affidavits of no objection in favour of the petitioner. 5. The deceased at the time of his death left behind the immoveable properties which are mentioned in the Schedule of Properties (Annexure “F” at 23 of this petition). Record also shows that the publication of the main petition has been effected in “Daily Jang & Kawish” Karachi dated 18.02.2019 but none has appeared and filed any Objection in this regard. Hence, the matter emerged as non-contentious one, therefore, in my opinion, there is no legal impediment to grant the present SMA. Accordingly, this SMA is allowed as per Rule. However, since this matter is non-contentious one, therefore, the petitioner would be at liberty to deposit the original title documents of the immoveable property of the subject proceedings with the Nazir of this Court as surety as well as execute personal bond in the like amount for issuance of letter of administration. The instant SMA No.47 /2019 is disposed of. JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI / P.A
